parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json._error === true ? JSON.stringify({ error: $json.detail || "Workflow error", step: $json.step || "unknown" }) : JSON.stringify({ sent_count: $json.sent_count, failed_count: $json.failed_count, total_count: $json.total_count, sheet_url: $json.sheet_url, failed_emails: $json.failed_emails }) }}
